message:
Command `# DRT actively routing. Iter 1: 40% complete, 132993 violations.
# This will be a very long process (many hours).
# Set up background monitor and do extended waits.

cat > /tmp/drt_watch.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=824793
OUT="/tmp/drt_watch.log"
echo "Started $(date)" > "$OUT"
while kill -0 $LR_PID 2>/dev/null; do
  sleep 600
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  DRT=$(grep "Completing\|Start [0-9]*th\|Total wire" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | xargs | head -c 80)
  FGDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] alive($ELAPSED) | $DRT" >> "$OUT"
  [ -n "$FGDS" ] && echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] GDS=$FGDS" >> "$OUT"
done
echo "LR done $(date)" >> "$OUT"
tail -20 "$LOG" >> "$OUT"
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/drt_watch.sh
pkill -f "drt_watch" 2>/dev/null || true
nohup /tmp/drt_watch.sh > /dev/null 2>&1 &
echo "Background DRT watcher PID=$!"
echo "Watch log: /tmp/drt_watch.log"` executed with exit code -1.

  FGDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)

function.name: execute_bash

content: Command exited with code -1 and error:

extras.command:
# DRT actively routing. Iter 1: 40% complete, 132993 violations.
# This will be a very long process (many hours).
# Set up background monitor and do extended waits.

cat > /tmp/drt_watch.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=824793
OUT="/tmp/drt_watch.log"
echo "Started $(date)" > "$OUT"
while kill -0 $LR_PID 2>/dev/null; do
  sleep 600
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  DRT=$(grep "Completing\|Start [0-9]*th\|Total wire" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | xargs | head -c 80)
  FGDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] alive($ELAPSED) | $DRT" >> "$OUT"
  [ -n "$FGDS" ] && echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] GDS=$FGDS" >> "$OUT"
done
echo "LR done $(date)" >> "$OUT"
tail -20 "$LOG" >> "$OUT"
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/drt_watch.sh
pkill -f "drt_watch" 2>/dev/null || true
nohup /tmp/drt_watch.sh > /dev/null 2>&1 &
echo "Background DRT watcher PID=$!"
echo "Watch log: /tmp/drt_watch.log"
